name: wilson-research
description: Research-fetch tools for Claude Code — pull the latest research material from arXiv and from YouTube. `/wilson-research:yt <url>` extracts a video's caption transcript (manual or auto-generated, any available language); `/wilson-research:arxiv <query>` searches the official arXiv API or looks up a paper by id, returning title / authors / abstract / categories / pdf link. Pure Python stdlib — no binaries, no pip dependencies, no API key.
